Bank form page subtitle: Create a bank account and link it to a chart-of-accounts entry for payments.
Bank section identity subtitle: Bank name and internal code for quick identification in the system.
Bank section accounting subtitle: Select a chart-of-accounts entry to post bank transactions correctly.
Bank section description subtitle: A short note explaining how this bank account is used in the fleet.
Hint Bank Name: Enter the bank name as shown in lists and reports (up to 255 characters).
Hint Bank Code: A short unique bank code within the fleet (up to 100 characters).
Hint Bank Counting ID: Select a bank account from the chart; a dedicated bank account is preferred.
Hint Bank Description: Describe the purpose of this account (up to 500 characters).
Example Bank Name: Example: Al Rajhi Bank - Riyadh Branch

Bank accounting link guidance: Each bank must be linked to a chart account so transactions appear correctly in financial reports.
